task.summary: Add `KeyboardKeyExtensions` utility for mapping Raylib keys to `Key` model and clean up unused imports

Make start locacation claculations non destructive and bias towards larger landmass.
AI now settles cities again
AI now correctly fortifies defenders in cities

Fixed a bug where TileApi.units returned raw Unit objects instead of UnitApi wrappers, causing "object is nil" errors in Lua scripts.
Optimized the return type of TileApi.units to IEnumerable for better compatibility with Lua iterators.
Created a comprehensive suite of API tests for all script objects in the Engine/src/Scripting/ScriptObjects/ directory.
Fixed several bugs discovered during test implementation to ensure correct behavior and Lua compatibility.
Fix test namespaces and unify tests into a single project
Cleanup AI interface and remove some duplication
AI now selects research based on AIValue
AI now selects research based on AIValue modified for epoch
Test fixes and cleanup for labels loading

MESSAGE.value: Add `KeyboardKeyExtensions` utility for mapping Raylib keys to `Key` model and clean up unused imports

Make start locacation claculations non destructive and bias towards larger landmass.
AI now settles cities again
AI now correctly fortifies defenders in cities

Fixed a bug where TileApi.units returned raw Unit objects instead of UnitApi wrappers, causing "object is nil" errors in Lua scripts.
Optimized the return type of TileApi.units to IEnumerable for better compatibility with Lua iterators.
Created a comprehensive suite of API tests for all script objects in the Engine/src/Scripting/ScriptObjects/ directory.
Fixed several bugs discovered during test implementation to ensure correct behavior and Lua compatibility.
Fix test namespaces and unify tests into a single project
Cleanup AI interface and remove some duplication
AI now selects research based on AIValue
AI now selects research based on AIValue modified for epoch
Test fixes and cleanup for labels loading
